settings.subheadline: Not a joint supplement for aging bodies. Performance fuel for active adults who refuse to sit this one out. Four clinically studied branded ingredients. One daily ritual.

settings.title: THE "SLOW DOWN" LIE
settings.description: People who internalize "you're declining" narratives are 32% more likely to develop chronic pain (Yale, 7-year longitudinal study). The framing isn't just wrong — it makes things worse.

settings.title: THE ONE-TRICK PROBLEM
settings.description: Most supplements hit a single inflammatory pathway. Your body has four pathways involved in joint discomfort. Covering one while ignoring three is like fixing one tire on a car that needs four.

settings.title: THE HIDDEN-DOSE GAME
settings.description: Proprietary blends. "Proprietary matrices." Generic ingredients marketed as premium. 60+ SKUs researched and most can't even tell you how much of each ingredient you're actually getting.

settings.headline:
EVERY JOINT SUPPLEMENT TELLS YOU
YOU'RE BROKEN. YOU'RE NOT.
settings.body: You feel 45 inside. You hike, you play, you lift, you move. That's who you are. Joint discomfort doesn't change that — it just means your body needs better fuel to keep up with who you've always been. The problem isn't you. It's that no supplement has ever combined the science that actually works.

settings.description: The deepest evidence base of any joint supplement ingredient. An umbrella meta-analysis of 11 prior meta-analyses confirmed significant reductions in pain, stiffness, and function. Proven comparable to prescription NSAIDs — with zero GI side effects.
settings.stat_label: WOMAC score reduction in 8-month clinical study. The gold standard used by Thorne, Jarrow, and Momentous.

settings.dose: 100 mg/day — the lowest effective dose of any ingredient
settings.description: Covers the second major inflammatory cascade that curcumin doesn't touch. Benefits appear as early as day 5 — the fastest onset of any botanical studied. Effects persisted a full month after stopping, suggesting possible disease-modifying action.
settings.stat_label: WOMAC pain reduction. Safest high-efficacy option for adults taking blood thinners, statins, or diabetes meds.

settings.description: Outperformed glucosamine + chondroitin in a head-to-head 191-patient RCT. Works through a unique mechanism: tiny doses of native collagen reprogram T-cells to stop immune-mediated cartilage destruction. 40 mg adds virtually no capsule burden.
settings.stat_label: Pain reduction in the landmark Lugo 2016 trial — outperforming glucosamine + chondroitin on every measure.

settings.description: The most compelling emerging ingredient in joint health. A 2025 meta-analysis found significant pain reduction at 6, 8, and 24 weeks. Works through PPAR-α receptor activation — a mechanism entirely distinct from every other ingredient in this formula.
settings.stat_label: Greater absorption than standard PEA via cold-water dispersibility technology. No major brand combines PEA with joint ingredients — until now.

settings.nsaid_body: Multiple head-to-head clinical trials have shown supplement ingredients performing comparably to prescription-strength anti-inflammatories — with significantly fewer side effects. Here are three from our ingredient stack:

settings.headline: US VS. THEM
settings.subtitle: Not over-hyped or overpriced. Just the most complete joint formula on the market.

settings.what: Boswellia kicks in first. AprèsFlex begins reducing 5-LOX inflammation — the fastest onset of any botanical studied. You may notice morning stiffness starting to ease.

Curcumin anti-inflammatory effects build. Meriva's phytosome delivery starts reducing COX-2 and NF-κB — a second inflammatory pathway now covered. PEA begins modulating pain signals via the endocannabinoid system.
Full curcumin + PEA synergy. Inflammatory biomarkers (CRP, TNF-α) significantly reduced. Most people report noticeable improvement in daily activities — stairs, morning stiffness, exercise recovery.
UC-II oral tolerance fully establishes. Your immune system is now reprogrammed to reduce immune-mediated cartilage breakdown. This is where structural, lasting benefit begins.
All four mechanisms fully active. Deepening structural benefit from UC-II. Cumulative anti-inflammatory action. This is the long game — the benefit keeps building.

settings.headline:
REAL TIMELINES.
NOT MIRACLE PROMISES.
settings.subtitle: Each ingredient activates on its own timeline. Here's what the clinical research says you can expect — not what marketing says you want to hear.

settings.headline:
I WASN'T READY
TO SIT THIS OUT.
settings.story:
At 52, I could still outpace most people on a trail. I played pickleball three mornings a week. I lifted. I moved. That's who I was.

Then my knees started disagreeing with me. The morning stiffness turned into afternoon aches that turned into skipped workouts. My doctor's advice? "Well, at your age…" I stopped listening at "at your age."

I tried everything. Glucosamine from the drugstore. Generic turmeric capsules. That subscription everyone sees on TV — twelve pills a day and nothing to show for it. I became obsessed with finding what the clinical research actually said worked.

What I found shocked me. There were four distinct biological pathways involved in joint discomfort — and not a single product on the market covered all four. The best ingredients existed, proven in rigorous clinical trials. But they were scattered across different products, different brands, different categories. Nobody had put them together.

So I did. Four branded, clinically studied ingredients. Every dose transparent. Every mechanism covered. Not because I wanted to start a supplement company — but because I wanted to keep hiking.
settings.pullquote: I was told to slow down. I decided to find better fuel instead.
settings.signature: — Still moving. Still playing. Still in the game.

settings.quote: Absolute game changer. I'm back on the pickleball court four days a week. My partner says I'm moving like I did five years ago.
settings.name: Robert K.

settings.quote: I've tried everything. Glucosamine, turmeric capsules from the drugstore, prescription stuff. This is the first time something actually worked. I can get on the floor with my grandkids again.
settings.name: Linda M.

settings.quote: I was skeptical — I've been burned by supplements before. But week two I noticed the morning stiffness was fading. By month two I added a second hike day to my week. I'm 54 and I'm not done.
settings.name: David T.

settings.product_subtitle: Joint Performance Fuel · 90 capsules · 30 Day Supply
settings.headline: START YOUR DAILY DOSE OF FREEDOM.
settings.body: Two capsules every morning. That's it. Your daily reminder that you're still in the game — and you're not going anywhere.

settings.question: How is this different from glucosamine and chondroitin?
settings.answer: Glucosamine and chondroitin target one pathway — structural cartilage support. Still In The Game covers four distinct mechanisms: two anti-inflammatory pathways (COX-2 and 5-LOX), immune-mediated cartilage protection (oral tolerance), and endocannabinoid pain modulation. In fact, one of our ingredients — UC-II collagen — outperformed the glucosamine + chondroitin combination in a head-to-head clinical trial of 191 patients.

settings.question: Will this interact with my medications?
settings.answer: Three of our four ingredients — Boswellia, UC-II, and PEA — have minimal drug interaction risk, making them well-suited for adults taking blood thinners, statins, or diabetes medications. Curcumin has a moderate interaction profile, particularly with warfarin and certain statins. We always recommend discussing any new supplement with your healthcare provider, especially if you're taking prescription medications.

settings.question: How long until I notice a difference?
settings.answer: Based on clinical research: Boswellia (AprèsFlex) can begin working as early as day 5. Curcumin and PEA typically show effects in weeks 2–4. UC-II takes 60–90 days to fully establish oral immune tolerance. We designed this formula so you get fast-acting relief from Boswellia while the longer-building ingredients establish deeper, structural benefits over time. Give it the full 90 days — that's why our guarantee covers the entire period.

settings.question: Why should I trust this over the big brands?
settings.answer: Read the labels. Our formula uses four branded, clinically studied ingredient forms (Meriva®, AprèsFlex®, UC-II®, Levagen+®) at their validated clinical doses, with every milligram disclosed. The top-selling DTC joint supplement uses zero branded ingredients, hides behind generic formulations, and charges $80–94/month. We compete on what's inside the capsule, not what's on the TV.

settings.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
settings.answer: We offer a full 90-day money-back guarantee. Not 30 days — 90. Because UC-II takes 60–90 days to fully establish its mechanism, and we want you to experience the complete formula working together before making a judgment. If you're not satisfied for any reason, we'll refund your purchase in full. No hoops, no hassle.

settings.question: Can I take this alongside my current joint supplement?
settings.answer: Still In The Game is designed to be a complete joint formula — no stacking required. Most people replace their existing supplements with this single product. If you're currently taking a standalone omega-3, you can continue that alongside our formula for additional benefit. As always, check with your healthcare provider about your specific supplement stack.

settings.headline:
YOU'RE STILL IN THE GAME.
WE'RE HERE TO KEEP YOU THERE.
settings.body: Your body was built to move. To hike, to play, to lift, to live. Three capsules a day. Four mechanisms working together. One daily reminder of who you've always been.
